type.description: Type of the account, `contract` - smart contract programmable account.

address.description: Public key hash of the contract

kind.description:
Kind of the contract (`delegator_contract` or `smart_contract`),
where `delegator_contract` - manager.tz smart contract for delegation purpose only.

alias.description: Name of the project behind the contract or contract description.

creator.description:
Information about the account, which has deployed the contract to the blockchain.  
Click on the field to expand more details.

delegate.description:
Information about the current delegate of the contract. `null` if it's not delegated.  
Click on the field to expand more details.

delegationLevel.description: Block height of latest delegation. `null` if it's not delegated.

delegationTime.description: Block datetime of latest delegation (ISO 8601, e.g. `2020-02-20T02:40:57Z`). `null` if it's not delegated.

numContracts.description: Number of contracts, created (originated) and/or managed by the contract.

tokensCount.description: Number of tokens minted in the contract.

activeTokensCount.description: Number of account tokens with non-zero balances.

tokenBalancesCount.description: Number of tokens the account ever had.

tokenTransfersCount.description: Number of token transfers from/to the account.

ticketsCount.description: Number of tickets minted in the contract.

activeTicketsCount.description: Number of tickets the account owns.

ticketBalancesCount.description: Number of tickets the account ever owned.

ticketTransfersCount.description: Number of ticket transfers from/to the account.

numDelegations.description: Number of delegation operations of the contract.

numOriginations.description: Number of origination (deployment / contract creation) operations, related the contract.

numTransactions.description:
Number of transaction (transfer) operations, related to the contract.  
**[sortable]**

numReveals.description: Number of reveal (is used to reveal the public key associated with an account) operations of the contract.

numMigrations.description:
Number of migration (result of the context (database) migration during a protocol update) operations.
related to the contract (synthetic type).

transferTicketCount.description: Number of transfer ticket operations related to the contract.

increasePaidStorageCount.description: Number of `increase_paid_storage` operations related to the contract.

eventsCount.description: Number of events produced by the contract.

firstActivity.description:
Block height of the contract creation.  
**[sortable]**

firstActivityTime.description: Block datetime of the contract creation (ISO 8601, e.g. `2020-02-20T02:40:57Z`).

lastActivity.description:
Height of the block in which the account state was changed last time.  
**[sortable]**

lastActivityTime.description: Datetime of the block in which the account state was changed last time (ISO 8601, e.g. `2020-02-20T02:40:57Z`).

typeHash.description:
32-bit hash of the contract parameter and storage types.
This field can be used for searching similar contracts (which have the same interface).

codeHash.description:
32-bit hash of the contract code.
This field can be used for searching same contracts (which have the same script).

storage.description: Contract storage value. Omitted by default. Use `?includeStorage=true` to include it into response.
